reviews.review_description: Not a bad sandbox game, I really enjoyed the experience. However I would recommend implementing some sort of continual tracking system for the menu kinda like what they were able to do in the SAO anime. That would definitely improve the combat so the menu doesn't just stay in one static place while you are trying to change quickly to a different weapon
Absolutely needed this game will be amazing if given the chance to improve
I can't wait for the full release to come out so I can level up and play it like the anime

reviews.review_title: When will it fully come out
reviews.review_description: I know it is still in development but i would like to know the suspected release date i tried joining the discord server but it would not let me dl anything it said enable 2fa and i did it still would not let me do anything but for a early access it is still really good.

This game is so good and the closest to SAO I've seen! I just really really hope it is free for anyone who played the demo! I got it and it is so fun using the hand tracking to kill monsters, it feels like I am actually inside of SAO!!! And to everyone at XuKing Studio, I just want to say you have my full support. Thank you all for working so hard to make so many peoples dream come true. I hope you all go so far in your lives, goodluck and thank you😊

i dont know if its just my game or if its because im on the quest 2 but some functionality doesnt work or is limitted ie i cant fight heathcliff. However, i absolutely love this game as it gives an sao like experience that ive been wanting since i first watched it. its well made and i see it going pretty far if the devs continue development. thank you for working so hard please dont stop development :)
Good game
Concept is epic looking forward to playing it when it is fully developed and ready speaking of which when will that be

Tried uninstalling and reinstalling multiple times, hunting for a tutorial, doing what any observers would consider petting the air or swatting flies trying to open up the elusive menu that all the pictures keep telling me to reference the tutorial for yet, have yet to touch a single tutorial, then after the first reinstall, it assumed my eyes were at the characters feet for some reason, didnt even wanna attempt trying to reach for the menu again, felt like as many times as i swatted and swapped different gestures and motions and everything, its gonna be fun watching my security cameras lol, atleast i didnt waste any money on it. Please fix the bugs before release, i really love the SAO series and this is probably the closest we'll ever get to that show and id hate to see it go the same route as all the other games are goin anymore.
This game is one of the best games that I’ve seen that’s the closest to sao
It's gonna be released in October-December. Can't wait!!!
Very much like sao
This game is very fun and I am excited to see what new things will be added
it keeps saying "make sure that your headset if on and connected to the internet within the next hour" and im connected and it is on so how can i download it ?
The logout button doesn't work 😂😂😂 10/10

reviews.review_title: Ik this is gonna be an absolute Beauty
reviews.review_description: I haven’t tried the demo out yet but I have already heard such wonderful and remarkable things from this and I’m here to tell you guys not to give up on making an amazing experience for us users…
I love the game demo so far I just wonder when the full game will be released because I plan to buy it when it releases
Please tell me where it is.

developer_response.body: This game is still in development

reviews.review_title: When is is the full game coming out?
reviews.review_description: When is the full game coming out
Do you have a go fund me, or kick starter? If an RPG, full fledged, like this came out -- I'd be a player for life. Shut up take my money!
Great Game, cannot wait for more updates and the full game in the future! Keep it up!
It would be cool if u had a ai partner to chat and do some activities and also do some cool combo moves with
This is awesome the only thing that would make it better would be the Elucidator from the anime, I even have it in real life hope you see this and I hope you add it thanks
This game is the closest we have far to actually good SAO game and I will not let anyone stop it from reaching its true potential
If you love sao this game is perfect I really hope they add a story mode
Don't know how to make magic work
The game has so much potential to become one of the best melee combat games it’s still in development but a great game for free
Finally, I can get one step closer to SAO. As a fan of Sword Art Online, I am truly eagerly anticipating the release of the official game.

Fun if bugs are not present like a 9/10. if its buggy like a 3/10. Bugs i ran into: Menu wont open, Menu invisible(you can hear it pop up and close), weapon stuck on belt, menu stopped being clickable with handtracking, menu buttons clicked but nothing happens(nice bug while fighting)

Dont get me wrong here. I really like the game and i hope they are continuing the development

developer_response.body: If you don't mind, you can provide us with the video so that we can better locate these bugs. We will solve these problems as soon as possible. You can also join our discord to provide some more detailed instructions.：  https://discord.gg/hDgmfFee

reviews.review_description: This is just a piece of work can't wait to see this game get on the main store and see future updates
This game is awesome and im super excited for the full game to come out!!!

the combat is fun, i just wish you could move a lil faster with the analogue stick as i dont have the space to freely walk around but i can swing my arms around no problem, 
i'd love to see this expand, and maybe one day an actual mmo similar to the SAO anime, because a mmo of the sao anime would explode if done right,
i hope this game continues to expand and the fights were enjoyable.

This game is pretty good it is quite a surprise that the people manage to recreate the anime in a vr game and this one is quite big without namco getting mad about it, if this game were to release fully on meta quest and the dev released the DLC and everything this game might be top 1 seller especially if it has multiplayer

The game is really cool, especially for me, cause I love SAO
I just think that weapon reloads can be improved and that'd be great, thank you for creating this masterpiece.

for some reason it keeps saying my headset has to be on the internet which it is. and i cannot find it in the store on my quest 2 but i really want to try this. if a dev would reach out that would be awesome!
We have been watting for years

One of the best combat systems, great mechanics, good graphics and well optimized. I think this game could grow and be amazing to play one day. At the moment it lacks in interaction with the menus and the diversity of enemies. I see great potential in the Sword Art Online mod and I hope to see it arrive in an official and improved form one day.
Really exciting

reviews.review_title: I have been looking for it!
reviews.review_description:
I have been looking for a good SAO VR for what feels like my entire life!
I have high hopes for it and am looking forward to the first full release

I really like the idea and gameplay. There are some bugs currently which can be a bit annoying. for example in MR mode when you drop your weapon it goes below the actual surface level so you cannot physically pick it up anymore, well you can respawn it of course but sometimes the menu becomes unresponsive and in the middle of the fight it might be annoying. However I really think that with some more work this game can be a masterpiece

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for your feedback, it was very useful for us, these issues will be fixed in the next release.
